local.skip_reason: Canonical R worker integration requires Linux

clean_clone.mode: remote detached checkout without local object reuse

browser.allowed_warning_policy: Only the three exact Vega Infinite extent forms for distance, x, and y are allowed, with a bounded total count, after finite-matrix and nonblank-pixel checks.

retained_failed_ci_attempts.reason: A corpus-form selector race prevented the browser gate from reaching the result presentation.
Form interaction progressed, but the result-publication failure lacked a specific browser-side reference.
The added failure capture still returned a generic result-publication reference.
Content-free lifecycle diagnostics proved scientific completion while the public result view remained absent.
The full result view and export were reached, but a Streamlit rerun cancelled the second browser download.
The audit closed an already-open corpus documentation expander during a rerender.
All substantive checks passed; the strict console gate had not yet classified five exact transient Vega warnings.

command: ./scripts/bootstrap.sh; ./scripts/verify.sh; uv run python scripts/browser_audit_p009.py --output /tmp/delta-p009-browser-audit; docker build --platform linux/amd64 --file containers/Dockerfile .

replay.working_directory: Fresh private-remote detached macOS clone plus GitHub Actions Ubuntu 24.04 checkout of exact commit c5e39b07bb65a11613684a10269b186c987ef980
replay.command: ./scripts/bootstrap.sh; ./scripts/verify.sh; uv run python scripts/browser_audit_p009.py --output /tmp/delta-p009-browser-audit; docker build --platform linux/amd64 --file containers/Dockerfile .
limitations: The macOS clean clone may reuse package-manager caches and cannot execute the canonical Linux worker boundary.
The GitHub-hosted runner image is named but is not represented by an immutable runner-image digest.
Browser screenshots and the temporary audit JSON remain in the ephemeral GitHub runner; the full audit JSON is retained in the GitHub job log because repository artifact quota was unavailable.
Five exact transient Vega warnings are bounded and retained separately; finite exported matrices and nonblank chart pixels were independently verified.
The browser gate covers the exposed synthetic minimum-alpha Guided whole-text result slice, not all future purpose-specific P009 extensions.
Synthetic evidence does not establish general usability, benchmark accuracy, authorship, literary findings, FAIR certification, production readiness, or release acceptance.

notes: The exact P009 minimum-alpha result implementation passed local and fresh private-remote clean-clone verification, canonical Linux source and container gates, and a real upload-to-result browser workflow. Seven preceding failed CI attempts remain recorded as product and harness corrections. Full P009 and public activation remain open.
